item.title: ベーコン、トマト、たまごを一緒に焼いて朝ごはん。冷凍庫にいいベーグルが眠ってたのでトースターで起こす。
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: ベーコン、トマト、たまごを一緒に焼いて朝ごはん。冷凍庫にいいベーグルが眠ってたのでトースターで起こす。
item.content:encoded: ベーコン、トマト、たまごを一緒に焼いて朝ごはん。冷凍庫にいいベーグルが眠ってたのでトースターで起こす。

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)
きんキラキラキラ金曜日なん🫓
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#おはようございます
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
item.content:encoded:

おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)

item.title: ‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤 ‎ ‎ワシは… ‎アメリカ時間に ‎起きてる必要がある ‎ ‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎

item.title: Victoria Cruz, a matriarchal figure in the New York transgen…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Victoria Cruz, a matriarchal figure in the New York transgender community who was at the Stonewall Inn on the night of its 1969 police raid, and later worked as an advocate for survivors of anti-trans violence, died last month at 79. nyti.ms/4eKpldV
item.content:encoded: Victoria Cruz, a matriarchal figure in the New York transgender community who was at the Stonewall Inn on the night of its 1969 police raid, and later worked as an advocate for survivors of anti-trans violence, died last month at 79. nyti.ms/4eKpldV

item.title: 『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳 早川書房）を御紹介します。 n…
item.author: Katz@PanTraductia (@katzptd.bsky.social)
item.description:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。
item.content:encoded:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。

item.title: Researchers estimate our planet is home to roughly 20 millio…
item.author: Science Magazine (@science.org)
item.description:
Researchers estimate our planet is home to roughly 20 million insect species—only 1 million of which have been scientifically described.

Learn more: https://scim.ag/4b1vRuu
item.content:encoded:
Researchers estimate our planet is home to roughly 20 million insect species—only 1 million of which have been scientifically described.

Learn more: https://scim.ag/4b1vRuu

item.title: I have officially moved the majority of my dev work over to …
item.author: Theo - t3.gg {bot} (@theo-t3gg.bsky.social)
item.description:
I have officially moved the majority of my dev work over to Linux. I couldn't be happier. Here's a video about how and why I made the move.

Video: https://twitter.com/theo/status/2073169769134711215
item.content:encoded:
I have officially moved the majority of my dev work over to Linux. I couldn't be happier. Here's a video about how and why I made the move.

Video: https://twitter.com/theo/status/2073169769134711215

item.title: 本日は雅-miyabi-よりオススメリングをご紹介させて頂きます☆ 【桜梅桃李】 shop.miyabi.mu/ring…
item.author: 雅-miyabi-【公式】婚約指輪・結婚指輪専門店 (@miyabibridal.bsky.social)
item.description:
本日は雅-miyabi-よりオススメリングをご紹介させて頂きます☆
【桜梅桃李】
shop.miyabi.mu/ring/single/...

お花をイメージしてデザインされた桜梅桃李。
葉っぱの形に似たマーキスカットのダイヤモンドが個性的で人と差がつく婚約指輪になっております。
緩やかなS字のリングで一輪の花が咲く上品な婚約指輪なので歳を重ねても着けて頂けるリングです^-^
センターダイヤに向かってシュッとしたデザインで
指長効果抜群です!!

雅ｰmiyabiｰは全国で2店舗(京都本店・京都洛北店)のみ取り扱いです
item.content:encoded:
本日は雅-miyabi-よりオススメリングをご紹介させて頂きます☆
【桜梅桃李】
shop.miyabi.mu/ring/single/...

お花をイメージしてデザインされた桜梅桃李。
葉っぱの形に似たマーキスカットのダイヤモンドが個性的で人と差がつく婚約指輪になっております。
緩やかなS字のリングで一輪の花が咲く上品な婚約指輪なので歳を重ねても着けて頂けるリングです^-^
センターダイヤに向かってシュッとしたデザインで
指長効果抜群です!!

雅ｰmiyabiｰは全国で2店舗(京都本店・京都洛北店)のみ取り扱いです

item.title: Mexican fans gathered Tijuana to cheer Iran’s national foot…
item.author: Meidas Charise Lee 💙🌊🌴🥥🫘 (@chariselee.bsky.social)
item.description: Mexican fans gathered Tijuana to cheer Iran’s national football team and collect autographs before the squad departed following its World Cup elimination. Iran’s head coach said the bond between the two countries has been “written into history”
item.content:encoded: Mexican fans gathered Tijuana to cheer Iran’s national football team and collect autographs before the squad departed following its World Cup elimination. Iran’s head coach said the bond between the two countries has been “written into history”

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: Half of the Declaration of Independence is a list of 27 spec…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
Half of the Declaration of Independence is a list of 27 specific grievances lodged against King George III and his regime.

250 years later, many of these grievances apply to the reign of Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded:
Half of the Declaration of Independence is a list of 27 specific grievances lodged against King George III and his regime.

250 years later, many of these grievances apply to the reign of Donald Trump.

item.title: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.
item.content:encoded: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.

item.title: The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:

item.title: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.
item.content:encoded: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.

item.title: 🇧🇷João-baiano 🌎Synallaxis cinerea Conservação: Quase Amea…
item.author: Aves do Brasil (@avesbrasil.bsky.social)
item.description:
🇧🇷João-baiano
🌎Synallaxis cinerea
Conservação: Quase Ameaçada

Espécie endêmica do Brasil. O joão-baiano é uma ave passeriforme da família Furnariidae.
Synallaxis whitneyi é sinônimo de Synallaxis cinerea.

📷 Ciro Albano
item.content:encoded:
🇧🇷João-baiano
🌎Synallaxis cinerea
Conservação: Quase Ameaçada

Espécie endêmica do Brasil. O joão-baiano é uma ave passeriforme da família Furnariidae.
Synallaxis whitneyi é sinônimo de Synallaxis cinerea.

📷 Ciro Albano

item.title: Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they …
item.author: Dr. Redfern Jon Barrett (@redfernjon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
item.content:encoded:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
